Name: BehaviorParam
Description: Determines the behavior parameters used when triggering projectiles and attacks.

Fields.Name: Behavior Variation ID
Fields.Description: Used when calculating the ID for attack parameters. It is not used directly on the actual machine.

Fields.Name: Behavior Judgement ID
Fields.Description: Used when calculating the ID for attack parameters. This ID matches the action judgment ID entered in TAE.

Fields.Name: ID Calculation Rule
Fields.Description: The EzState behavior type to use for ID calculation.

Fields.Name: Call ID Type
Fields.Description: Which param type to reference for attack behavior.

Fields.Name: Attack Call ID
Fields.Description: The ID to call for attack behavior.

Fields.Name: Bullet Call ID
Fields.Description: The ID to call for attack behavior.

Fields.Name: SpEffect Call ID
Fields.Description: The ID to call for attack behavior.

Fields.Name: Particle Variation ID
Fields.Description: Offset applied to the particle ID invoked in the TAE event.

Fields.Name: Action Category
Fields.Description: The action category this behavior belongs to.

Fields.Name: Action Cost: Stamina
Fields.Description: Set the amount of stamina consumed during action.

Fields.Name: Action Cost: MP
Fields.Description: Set the amount of MP consumed during action.

Fields.Name: Attack Presentation Type
Fields.Description: Specify the particles and sounds at the time of attack (1 set by attribute, material, size).

Fields.Name: Attack Presentation: Material
Fields.Description: Specify the particles and sounds at the time of attack (1 set by attribute, material, size).

Fields.Name: Defense Presentation: Material
Fields.Description: Specify the particles and sounds when guarding against this attack. (1 set by attribute, material, size).

Fields.Name: Attack Presentation: Size
Fields.Description: Specify particles and sounds at the time of attack (Although it is reserved, it is used, so be sure to set it blank or small).

Fields.Name: Defense Presentation: Particles
Fields.Description: The particles used when guarding against this attack.
